name: 主僕關係漸變為真愛
description: 從太子利用女主當替罪羊，到逐漸被她的真誠打動。權力不對等的關係中萌生真感情，衝突核心在於身份差距和政治利害能否被愛情超越。太子最終為她跪下，是權力關係的徹底反轉。

examples.drama_title: Girl Transmigrated as a Doomed Palace Maid...Modern Knowledge Turned Her Into the Prince’s Treasure
examples.excerpt: If I want to hide my abilities and govern the state, I need a scapegoat by my side. This Camelli is still useful to me. ... If I lose, please find a way for her to survive. She is a timid person and afraid of losing her life. Her health is poor and she is sensitive to the cold. Send her to the south.
examples.context: 從太子利用女主當替罪羊，到逐漸被她的真誠打動。權力不對等的關係中萌生真感情，衝突核心在於身份差距和政治利害能否被愛情超越。太子最終為她跪下，是權力關係的徹底反轉。
